ValidationRule.description: Dealers cannot change Ownership of a Case other than initial submission to a Queue. Note: It is important to allow the NATT Case Setup and Case Team Updates Flow to move the Case initially to a Queue. After that the Dealer should not change ownership.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'NAC_Performance_Parts', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'nac_core_returns', AND( NOT(ISBLANK($User.ContactId)), ISCHANGED(OwnerId), NOT(ISNEW()), $User.Id <> PRIORVALUE(OwnerId) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not permitted to change the Case Owner. Please contact Carrier if a new Case Owner is needed.
